_meta.description: Watchlist — the single source of truth for the full monitoring pipeline. Add a ticker here and EVERYTHING auto-follows on the next GitHub Actions run: financial data fetch, rDCF, VP scoring, technical signals, confluence, position sizing, Telegram alerts.
_meta.how_to_add: Copy any existing entry, change ticker/yahoo/akshare/exchange/names, set vp_seed to neutral defaults (vp:50, all dimensions:50), set last_updated to today. Push. Done.

vp_dimension_guide.expectation_gap: AUTO — computed from rdcf delta (our_growth vs implied_growth). Do not edit manually.
vp_dimension_guide.fundamental_accel: AUTO — computed from fin_*.json (NI/Rev ratio, GM trend, FCF quality). Do not edit manually.
vp_dimension_guide.narrative_shift: MANUAL — how much has the market narrative around this stock changed in our favour? 0=no change, 100=complete re-rating
vp_dimension_guide.low_coverage: MANUAL — inverse of sell-side coverage density. High score = few analysts = more edge. 0=everyone covers it, 100=nobody covers it
vp_dimension_guide.catalyst_prox: MANUAL — proximity to a near-term binary catalyst that could force thesis resolution. 0=no catalyst, 100=imminent

_meta.v1_to_v1.2_history: 2026-05-08 (Junyan-direct): switched to 4-ticker focus on names Junyan personally tracks (BYD + Innolight retained; Tencent/NetEase/BeiGene removed; Geely + Da Shenlin added). Reason: Junyan's bullshit-detection on thesis quality requires familiar-domain coverage. Manual VP dimensions for the 2 new tickers seeded at neutral 50 — Junyan to adjust based on his knowledge after first thesis run.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: 1.6T mass production delayed beyond Q3 2026 OR NVDA+MSFT+GOOGL stock prices collectively drop >25% from ATH within 1 quarter (hyperscaler CapEx pullback proxy)
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 1.6T量产推迟至2026年Q3后，或英伟达/微软/谷歌股价集体较ATH下跌>25%（超大规模CapEx削减代理指标）

concentration_seed.rationale_e: Optical transceivers >90% of revenue + hyperscaler customer concentration (NVDA/MSFT/GOOGL) — product AND customer concentration AND-compound.
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 光模块业务占营收 >90% 且超大规模客户集中（英伟达/微软/谷歌）—— 产品与客户双重集中度叠加。

300308.SZ.narrative_shift_rationale: 1.6T SiPh transceiver narrative fully mainstream — NVIDIA Blackwell, Google TPU v5, Azure all adopted. Shifted from 'will they qualify' to 'market leader in next-gen optics'. Raised from 65→72.
300308.SZ.low_coverage_rationale: Mid-tier A-share components company. Moderate sell-side coverage from electronics analysts but niche enough to retain some edge. Held at 50.
300308.SZ.catalyst_prox_rationale: 1.6T volume ramp is near-term. 192% revenue growth validates. Slightly reduced 85→80 as primary catalyst (certification) is now delivered; next catalyst is volume scale.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters (tariff impact proxy) OR gross_margin drops below 15% OR earnings_growth < -40%
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 连续两季度营收增速<-10%（关税冲击代理指标），或毛利率跌破15%，或盈利增速<-40%

concentration_seed.rationale_e: Auto/NEV dominates (~80% revenue) but multiple segments (cars, batteries, electronics, semiconductors). Geographic spread broad (China + global expansion). Customer base diversified across consumers + B2B fleet + battery customers. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 汽车/新能源车占主导（约80%营收）但有多个业务板块（车、电池、电子、半导体）。地理分布广（中国+全球扩张）。客户基础多元化（消费者+B端车队+电池客户）。[未验证直觉]

002594.SZ.narrative_shift_rationale: Global EV champion narrative under severe pressure: EU tariffs, revenue -13.5%, earnings -40.5%, margin compression. The story is breaking down. Reduced 45→38.
002594.SZ.low_coverage_rationale: Extremely well-covered A-share stock. Zero coverage edge. Reduced 35→32.
002594.SZ.catalyst_prox_rationale: Monthly sales data (potential positive surprise) but no major structural catalyst near-term given tariff headwinds. Reduced 50→45.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW] revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters OR operating_margin < 3% (auto-industry stress proxy) OR EV market-share loss to BYD by >300bp QoQ
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: [等 Junyan 审核] 连续两季度营收增速<-10%，或经营利润率<3%（车企承压代理指标），或新能源车份额相比比亚迪季度环比下降>300bp

concentration_seed.rationale_e: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW] Auto-only business but diversified across ICE / EV / hybrid + Volvo/Polestar/Lotus subsidiaries + China + global. Customer base millions of consumers. Moderate concentration. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: [等 Junyan 审核] 业务集中于汽车但跨内燃/纯电/混动 + 沃尔沃/极星/路特斯子公司 + 中国/海外。客户基础数百万消费者。中等集中度。[未验证直觉]

175.HK.narrative_shift_rationale: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW — placeholder neutral 50] Geely's 'global multi-brand auto group' story is mid-development; EV transition partially priced. Junyan to adjust based on his domain knowledge.
175.HK.low_coverage_rationale: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW — placeholder 50] HK auto coverage moderate; not as crowded as Tencent but well-known. Junyan to adjust.
175.HK.catalyst_prox_rationale: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW — placeholder 50] Quarterly sales numbers + new model launches. Junyan to adjust based on calendar.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW] same-store sales growth < -5% YoY for 2 consecutive quarters OR operating_margin < 5% OR store-count growth < 5% YoY (expansion runway exhausted proxy)
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: [等 Junyan 审核] 连续两季度同店销售增速 < -5%，或经营利润率 < 5%，或门店数同比增速 < 5%（扩张跑道见顶代理指标）

concentration_seed.rationale_e: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW] Pharmacy retail chain — single business model (drugstore) but diversified across 2000+ stores in 14 provinces, mixed Rx + OTC + healthcare goods. Customer base millions of retail consumers. Low product-category concentration; moderate geographic concentration in southern China. [unvalidated intuition]
concentration_seed.rationale_z: [等 Junyan 审核] 药店连锁——单一业务模式（零售药房）但分布于 14 省 2000+ 门店，处方药+OTC+大健康商品组合。客户基础数百万零售消费者。产品类别集中度低；地理分布在华南有一定集中。[未验证直觉]

603233.SH.narrative_shift_rationale: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW — placeholder neutral 50] Pharmacy retail consolidation theme + medical insurance reform implications. Junyan to set based on his read on the policy backdrop.
603233.SH.low_coverage_rationale: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW — placeholder 50] Mid-cap A-share retail; coverage moderate not crowded. Junyan to adjust.
603233.SH.catalyst_prox_rationale: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW — placeholder 50] Quarterly same-store sales + medical insurance policy changes. Junyan to adjust based on calendar.

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: 2026H1 revenue YoY < +20% OR gross margin < 38% OR non-GAAP net profit YoY < 0 (per decision sheet wrong_if, source-bound to the H1 report)
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 2026半年报营收同比<+20%,或毛利率<38%,或扣非归母净利同比转负(决策书 wrong_if,披露绑定)

concentration_seed.rationale_e: CMP tools ~87% of revenue; single-product-family concentration mitigated by thinning/ion-implant/wafer-regen second engines (early)
concentration_seed.rationale_z: CMP 装备占营收 ~87%;减薄/离子注入/晶圆再生第二引擎尚早期

688120.SH.narrative_shift_rationale: storage-capex super-cycle theme repriced the name +33% in a month (5/08-6/11) with no new fundamentals — narrative already shifted, late not early
688120.SH.low_coverage_rationale: 155 institutions at the FY25 results call incl. UBS/BlackRock/GS Asia — heavily covered
688120.SH.catalyst_prox_rationale: 2026 H1 report (~Aug) = E1 proof event for order->revenue conversion
688120.SH._added: 2026-06-11 CTF batch-1 ticker #2 (Serenity Scan #1 #68, serenity_score 74 T2; nominations ratified by Junyan)

vp_seed.wrongIf_e: 2026H1 CMP-pad revenue YoY < +30% (if disclosed) OR gross margin < 48% OR net profit YoY < +25% (per decision sheet wrong_if)
vp_seed.wrongIf_z: 2026半年报抛光垫收入同比<+30%(如披露),或毛利率<48%,或归母净利同比<+25%(决策书 wrong_if)

concentration_seed.rationale_e: semis 57% of FY25 revenue and rising; legacy printing consumables -13% YoY; goodwill 9.17亿 after Haofei consolidation
concentration_seed.rationale_z: 半导体占 57% 且上升;打印耗材传统盘 -13%;皓飞并表后商誉 9.17 亿

300054.SZ.narrative_shift_rationale: CMP-materials localization theme hot (storage duo IPO chain lists); name +17.6% since 5/08, all-time high 5/26 — narrative mid-shift
300054.SZ.low_coverage_rationale: 开源 3/31 + 东海首次覆盖 5/12; dense May institutional visits — coverage building, denser than a year ago
300054.SZ.catalyst_prox_rationale: ChiNext H1 forecast (~mid-July) then H1 report (~Aug) = staged E1 proof events for pad/slurry momentum
300054.SZ._added: 2026-06-11 CTF batch-1 ticker #3 (Serenity Scan #1 #68, serenity_score 73 T2; nominations ratified by Junyan)
